bodyHtml:
Company File

Company Profile

A concise supplier overview for project teams comparing WEI LAN's manufacturing focus, smart sorting systems, credentials, and overseas project support.

Type: Company file Updated: 2026-06-30 Application: Procurement and management review Review time: 8 min

  • AI optical sorting and construction waste recycling product scope
  • Manufacturing, R&D, certifications, and quality control proof points
  • Project review process for overseas recycling equipment teams

Best used during supplier review, configuration planning, and internal approval

Use the company profile when your team needs an initial supplier qualification file before requesting brochures, certificates, or a technical proposal.
